title: EFL Dialogue Definition
description: Schema for dialogue set definitions. EFL owns which line is shown to whom under what conditions — the text itself either lives in MOMI localisation files (via locKey) or is passed through raw (via text).

npc.description: EFL NPC ID this dialogue set is bound to.

id.description: Unique entry identifier within this dialogue set.

locKey.description: FoM localisation key resolved at runtime against MOMI-injected localisation. Follows the convention: 'Conversations/Mods/<modId>/<entry>'. Takes priority over text when both are present. This is the preferred field — EFL owns the key, MOMI owns the text.

text.description: Raw dialogue text, passed through to FoM unchanged. FoM inline markup is supported: ^red^text^red^, $gold$text$gold$, =orange=text=orange=, #dark#text#dark#. Use locKey instead when localisation is needed.

portrait.description: FoM portrait asset name (e.g. 'spr_portrait_flora'). References a game asset — EFL does not own portrait sprites.

condition.description: Trigger ID or flag literal ('flag:name') evaluated at runtime. Empty = always shown.
